---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement, triage
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the problem you are trying to solve. What use case is currently painful or impossible?

## Proposed solution

Your proposed approach. Include API sketches, contract interfaces, or UI mockups where helpful.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you discarded them.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, prior art, or external discussions.
